title: Fix Object Refresh Not Reflecting Salesforce Changes for Leads
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the refresh button to pull the latest field metadata from Salesforce, so that my data dictionary stays in sync with my org.
description: Clicking the refresh button on the Lead object was not reflecting updated picklist values (e.g., Lead Source) from Salesforce. The metadata sync was not properly fetching or updating changed field values.
acceptance_criteria: Refresh button fetches latest metadata from Salesforce
Updated picklist values are reflected in the data dictionary after refresh
middleware_changes: Fixed metadata refresh logic to properly fetch and persist updated field values from Salesforce.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the issue and asked Ryan to review on staging.
